title: Getting started with tantivyr
text: time data frame want search columns. tnt_index_df() infers schema, indexes every row commits one call.
code: news <- data.frame(   id     = 1:5,   title  = c(     "Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso",     "Reforma tributária avança no senado",     "Nova lei de licitações entra em vigor",     "Congresso debate orçamentos municipais",     "Tribunal de contas analisa despesas"   ),   source = c("A", "B", "A", "C", "B"),   year   = c(2022L, 2023L, 2024L, 2024L, 2023L) )  idx <- tnt_index_df(   news,   text      = title,         # full-text column(s)   filters   = c(source, year), # columns to filter / order on   stemmer   = "portuguese",   stopwords = TRUE ) idx #>  #> ── <tnt_index> (in-memory) #> 5 documents · 4 fields #> • id: i64 #> • title: text [tnt_pt_stop] #> • source: text [raw] #> • year: i64

title: Getting started with tantivyr
text: tnt_search() returns tibble score column followed every stored field. used Portuguese stemmer, search orçamento also matches orçamentos.
code: tnt_search(idx, "orçamento") #> # A tibble: 2 × 5 #>   score    id title                                     source  year #>   <dbl> <dbl> <chr>                                     <chr>  <dbl> #> 1 0.893     1 Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso A       2022 #> 2 0.893     4 Congresso debate orçamentos municipais    C       2024

title: Getting started with tantivyr
text: Filters can written ordinary R comparisons. combined text query. can also pass raw Tantivy query string anything helpers cover:
code: tnt_search(idx, "", filter = year >= 2024) #> # A tibble: 2 × 5 #>   score    id title                                  source  year #>   <dbl> <dbl> <chr>                                  <chr>  <dbl> #> 1     1     4 Congresso debate orçamentos municipais C       2024 #> 2     1     3 Nova lei de licitações entra em vigor  A       2024  tnt_search(idx, "congresso", filter = source == "A") #> # A tibble: 1 × 5 #>   score    id title                                     source  year #>   <dbl> <dbl> <chr>                                     <chr>  <dbl> #> 1  1.77     1 Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso A       2022  tnt_search(idx, "", filter = year %in% c(2022, 2024), limit = 10) #> # A tibble: 3 × 5 #>   score    id title                                     source  year #>   <dbl> <dbl> <chr>                                     <chr>  <dbl> #> 1 1.39      1 Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso A       2022 #> 2 0.875     4 Congresso debate orçamentos municipais    C       2024 #> 3 0.875     3 Nova lei de licitações entra em vigor     A       2024 tnt_search(idx, "", filter = "year:[2023 TO *] AND source:B") #> # A tibble: 2 × 5 #>   score    id title                               source  year #>   <dbl> <dbl> <chr>                               <chr>  <dbl> #> 1 0.875     2 Reforma tributária avança no senado B       2023 #> 2 0.875     5 Tribunal de contas analisa despesas B       2023

title: Getting started with tantivyr
code: tnt_search(idx, "congresso", highlight = title)$title_snippet #> [1] "Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso" #> [2] "Congresso debate orçamentos municipais" tnt_search(idx, "", order_by = year, desc = TRUE)[, c("title", "year")] #> # A tibble: 5 × 2 #> title year #> #> 1 Congresso debate orçamentos municipais 2024 #> 2 Nova lei de licitações entra em vigor 2024 #> 3 Reforma tributária avança no senado 2023 #> 4 Tribunal de contas analisa despesas 2023 #> 5 Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso 2022

title: Getting started with tantivyr
text: tnt_count() returns total number matches, ignoring limit.
code: tnt_count(idx, "congresso") #> [1] 2 tnt_count(idx, "", filter = year == 2024) #> [1] 2

what: The explicit layer: schemas and persistence
title: Getting started with tantivyr
text: full control field stored, indexed analysed, build schema tnt_schema() tnt_*() field constructors, manage index . Add documents commit make searchable. Operations return index invisibly, pipe.
code: sch <- tnt_schema(   id    = tnt_i64(),   slug  = tnt_text(stemmer = "raw"),                 # exact key for updates   title = tnt_text(stemmer = "portuguese", stored = TRUE),   body  = tnt_text(stemmer = "portuguese"),   date  = tnt_date(fast = TRUE) )  path <- tempfile() idx <- tnt_index(path, schema = sch) docs <- data.frame(   id    = 1:2,   slug  = c("edital-001", "edital-002"),   title = c("Edital de licitação 001", "Edital de licitação 002"),   body  = c("Aquisição de equipamentos de informática.",             "Contratação de serviços de limpeza."),   date  = as.Date(c("2024-02-01", "2024-03-15")) )  idx |> tnt_add(docs) |> tnt_commit() tnt_num_docs(idx) #> [1] 2

previous_headings: The explicit layer: schemas and persistence
title: Getting started with tantivyr
text: tnt_update() replaces documents key column; tnt_delete() removes . need commit take effect.
code: idx |>   tnt_update(     data.frame(id = 1L, slug = "edital-001",                title = "Edital de licitação 001 (retificado)",                body = "Aquisição de notebooks.",                date = as.Date("2024-02-10")),     by = slug   ) |>   tnt_commit()  tnt_search(idx, "notebooks")[, c("id", "title")] #> # A tibble: 1 × 2 #>      id title                                #>   <dbl> <chr>                                #> 1     1 Edital de licitação 001 (retificado)  idx |> tnt_delete(slug == "edital-002") |> tnt_commit() tnt_num_docs(idx) #> [1] 1

previous_headings: The explicit layer: schemas and persistence
title: Getting started with tantivyr
text: -disk indexes survive across sessions. Call tnt_index() just path reopen — schema restored automatically.
code: reopened <- tnt_index(path) tnt_num_docs(reopened) #> [1] 1

title: Getting started with tantivyr
text: ?tnt_search documents every search option. ?tnt_field lists field types stemming/stop-word options. tnt_stemmers() returns supported languages.

what: tantivyr • Fast full-text search for R
title: tantivyr • Fast full-text search for R
text: tantivyr brings fast, local full-text search R. wraps Tantivy search engine — Rust library inspired Apache Lucene — let index data frame collection documents search BM25 ranking, structured filters, snippet highlighting incremental updates, machine. built text Portuguese English (stemming stop words included), making good fit public documents, news clippings, extracted PDF text, transcripts legal acts.

title: tantivyr • Fast full-text search for R
text: need Rust toolchain (cargo) build package source.
code: # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("StrategicProjects/tantivyr")

title: tantivyr • Fast full-text search for R
text: fastest way tnt_index_df(): point data frame, say columns text filters, search.
code: library(tantivyr)  news <- data.frame(   id    = 1:4,   title = c(     "Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso",     "Reforma tributária avança no senado",     "Nova lei de licitações entra em vigor",     "Congresso debate orçamentos municipais"   ),   year  = c(2022L, 2023L, 2024L, 2024L) )  idx <- tnt_index_df(   news,   text     = title,   filters  = year,   stemmer  = "portuguese",   stopwords = TRUE )  # BM25 search — note the Portuguese stemmer matches "orçamentos" too tnt_search(idx, "orçamento") #> # A tibble: 2 × 4 #>   score    id title                                      year #>   <dbl> <dbl> <chr>                                     <dbl> #> 1 0.710     1 Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso  2022 #> 2 0.710     4 Congresso debate orçamentos municipais     2024

title: tantivyr • Fast full-text search for R
text: Filters can written plain comparisons (year >= 2024) Tantivy query strings. Snippets come back <field>_snippet columns.
code: # structured filter tnt_search(idx, "", filter = year >= 2024) #> # A tibble: 2 × 4 #> score id title year #> #> 1 1 4 Congresso debate orçamentos municipais 2024 #> 2 1 3 Nova lei de licitações entra em vigor 2024 # highlighted snippets tnt_search(idx, "congresso", highlight = title)$title_snippet #> [1] "Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso" #> [2] "Congresso debate orçamentos municipais" # order by a fast field instead of relevance tnt_search(idx, "", order_by = year, desc = TRUE)[, c("title", "year")] #> # A tibble: 4 × 2 #> title year #> #> 1 Congresso debate orçamentos municipais 2024 #> 2 Nova lei de licitações entra em vigor 2024 #> 3 Reforma tributária avança no senado 2023 #> 4 Orçamento público aprovado pelo congresso 2022

title: tantivyr • Fast full-text search for R
text: full control, declare schema manage index . Indexes can live disk (reopened later) memory.
code: sch <- tnt_schema(   id    = tnt_i64(),   title = tnt_text(stemmer = "portuguese", stored = TRUE),   body  = tnt_text(stemmer = "portuguese") )  idx <- tnt_index(path = tempfile(), schema = sch)  idx |>   tnt_add(data.frame(id = 1L, title = "Edital de licitação", body = "...")) |>   tnt_commit()  # update (replace by key) and delete, then commit idx |>   tnt_update(data.frame(id = 1L, title = "Edital retificado", body = "..."), by = id) |>   tnt_commit()  tnt_count(idx, "edital") #> [1] 1

title: tantivyr • Fast full-text search for R
text: tantivyr retrieval: ranked, filtered, highlighted search text control, index updates incrementally persists disk. database embeddings/semantic-search tool — local, dependency-light BM25 engine R missing.

what: tantivyr: Fast Full-Text Search for R with 'Tantivy' — tantivyr-package
title: tantivyr: Fast Full-Text Search for R with 'Tantivy' — tantivyr-package
text: Index data frames document collections run fast full-text search entirely machine. 'tantivyr' wraps 'Tantivy' Rust search engine ('Lucene'-inspired library) provide 'BM25' ranking, structured filters, snippet highlighting incremental updates -disk -memory index. First-class support provided stemming stop words Portuguese English, making well suited public documents, news clippings, extracted 'PDF' text, transcripts legal acts.

title: tantivyr: Fast Full-Text Search for R with 'Tantivy' — tantivyr-package
text: Maintainer: Andre Leite leite@castlab.org Authors: Andre Leite leite@castlab.org Marcos Wasilew marcos.wasilew@gmail.com Hugo Vasconcelos hugo.vasconcelos@ufpe.br Carlos Amorin carlos.agaf@ufpe.br Diogo Bezerra diogo.bezerra@ufpe.br

what: Add documents to an index — tnt_add
title: Add documents to an index — tnt_add
text: Adds rows data documents. columns whose names match schema field used; columns ignored. Additions become searchable tnt_commit().

title: Add documents to an index — tnt_add
code: tnt_add(idx, data)

title: Add documents to an index — tnt_add
text: idx tnt_index. data data frame whose columns map schema fields name.

title: Add documents to an index — tnt_add
text: tnt_index, invisibly (calls can piped).

title: Add documents to an index — tnt_add
code: sch <- tnt_schema(id = tnt_i64(), body = tnt_text(stemmer = "english")) idx <- tnt_index(schema = sch) df <- data.frame(id = 1:2, body = c("the quick fox", "lazy dogs sleep")) idx |> tnt_add(df) |> tnt_commit() tnt_num_docs(idx) #> [1] 2

title: Commit pending changes — tnt_commit
text: Flushes buffered additions deletions index refreshes reader become visible tnt_search().

title: Commit pending changes — tnt_commit
code: tnt_commit(idx)

title: Commit pending changes — tnt_commit
text: idx tnt_index.

title: Commit pending changes — tnt_commit
text: tnt_index, invisibly.

title: Commit pending changes — tnt_commit
code: sch <- tnt_schema(body = tnt_text(stemmer = "english")) idx <- tnt_index(schema = sch) tnt_add(idx, data.frame(body = "hello")) |> tnt_commit()

title: Count matching documents — tnt_count
text: Returns total number documents matching query optional filter, ignoring result limit.

title: Count matching documents — tnt_count
code: tnt_count(idx, query = "", fields = NULL, filter = NULL)

title: Count matching documents — tnt_count
text: idx tnt_index. query query string tantivy's query syntax. empty string "" matches documents (useful filter). fields <tidy-select> Text fields searched bare (unqualified) query terms. Defaults indexed text fields. filter Either tantivy query string, comparison expression year >= 2020 & source == "globo". Supported operators: ==, %%, >, >=, <, <=, combined & |.

title: Count matching documents — tnt_count
text: single numeric count.

title: Count matching documents — tnt_count
code: idx <- tnt_index_df(   data.frame(t = c("apple pie", "apple tart", "banana bread")),   text = t, stemmer = "english" ) tnt_count(idx, "apple") #> [1] 2

what: Delete documents by field value — tnt_delete
title: Delete documents by field value — tnt_delete
text: Marks deletion every document whose field equals given value(s), using field == value expression. Deletions take effect tnt_commit(). reliable deletion field exact field: numeric/date field, text field created stemmer = "raw".

title: Delete documents by field value — tnt_delete
code: tnt_delete(idx, condition)

title: Delete documents by field value — tnt_delete
text: idx tnt_index. condition expression form field == value. value may vector, deleting matching documents.

title: Delete documents by field value — tnt_delete
text: tnt_index, invisibly.

title: Delete documents by field value — tnt_delete
code: sch <- tnt_schema(id = tnt_i64(), body = tnt_text(stemmer = "english")) idx <- tnt_index(schema = sch) tnt_add(idx, data.frame(id = 1:3, body = c("a", "b", "c"))) |> tnt_commit() tnt_delete(idx, id == 2) |> tnt_commit() tnt_num_docs(idx) #> [1] 2

title: Define schema fields — tnt_field
text: constructors describe single field tnt_schema(). returns lightweight tnt_field object.

title: Define schema fields — tnt_field
code: tnt_text(   stored = TRUE,   indexed = TRUE,   fast = FALSE,   stemmer = "none",   stopwords = FALSE )  tnt_i64(stored = TRUE, indexed = TRUE, fast = FALSE)  tnt_u64(stored = TRUE, indexed = TRUE, fast = FALSE)  tnt_f64(stored = TRUE, indexed = TRUE, fast = FALSE)  tnt_bool(stored = TRUE, indexed = TRUE, fast = FALSE)  tnt_date(stored = TRUE, indexed = TRUE, fast = FALSE)  tnt_json(stored = TRUE, indexed = TRUE)

title: Define schema fields — tnt_field
text: stored Logical. Keep original value returned tnt_search(). Defaults TRUE. indexed Logical. Index field can searched filtered. Defaults TRUE. fast Logical. Build columnar "fast field" enabling fast filtering ordering (required order_by tnt_search()). Defaults FALSE, except tnt_text(fast = ...) fast field default. stemmer Stemming/tokenization text field. One "none" (plain tokenization, lower-cased), "raw" (exact, untokenized — ideal ids exact filters), Snowball language "portuguese" "english". See tnt_stemmers(). stopwords Logical. Remove stop words chosen language. Bundled Portuguese English. Defaults FALSE.

title: Define schema fields — tnt_field
text: tnt_field object.

title: Define schema fields — tnt_field
code: tnt_schema(   id    = tnt_i64(),   title = tnt_text(stemmer = "portuguese", stopwords = TRUE),   body  = tnt_text(stemmer = "portuguese"),   date  = tnt_date() ) #>  #> ── tantivyr schema (4 fields)  #> • id: i64 #> • title: text [tnt_pt_stop] #> • body: text [tnt_pt] #> • date: date

what: Create or open a search index — tnt_index
title: Create or open a search index — tnt_index
text: Opens existing -disk index, creates new one tnt_schema(). path = NULL -memory index created (useful tests transient work).

title: Create or open a search index — tnt_index
code: tnt_index(path = NULL, schema = NULL, overwrite = FALSE, heap_mb = 128)

title: Create or open a search index — tnt_index
text: path Directory -disk index, NULL -memory index. directory already contains index opened (unless overwrite = TRUE). schema tnt_schema(). Required creating new index; ignored opening existing one. overwrite Logical. TRUE, existing index path deleted recreated schema. Defaults FALSE. heap_mb Indexing memory budget MB (minimum 15). Defaults 128.

title: Create or open a search index — tnt_index
text: tnt_index object.

title: Create or open a search index — tnt_index
code: sch <- tnt_schema(   id    = tnt_i64(),   title = tnt_text(stemmer = "english"),   body  = tnt_text(stemmer = "english") ) idx <- tnt_index(schema = sch) # in-memory idx #>  #> ── <tnt_index> (in-memory)  #> 0 documents · 3 fields #> • id: i64 #> • title: text [tnt_en] #> • body: text [tnt_en]

what: Index a data frame in one call — tnt_index_df
title: Index a data frame in one call — tnt_index_df
text: convenience wrapper infers schema data, creates index, adds every row commits. Text columns made searchable; filter columns indexed filtering ordering; columns stored returned tnt_search().

title: Index a data frame in one call — tnt_index_df
code: tnt_index_df(   data,   text,   filters = NULL,   stemmer = "none",   stopwords = FALSE,   stored = TRUE,   path = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   heap_mb = 128 )

title: Index a data frame in one call — tnt_index_df
text: data data frame. text <tidy-select> Columns index full-text fields. filters <tidy-select> Columns index filtering/ordering (type inferred). Optional. stemmer, stopwords Stemming stop-word options applied text columns. See tnt_text(). stored Logical. Store text columns returned searches. path, overwrite, heap_mb Passed tnt_index().

title: Index a data frame in one call — tnt_index_df
text: committed tnt_index object.

title: Index a data frame in one call — tnt_index_df
code: df <- data.frame(   id = 1:2,   title = c("Orçamento público aprovado", "Reforma tributária avança"),   year = c(2023L, 2024L) ) idx <- tnt_index_df(df, text = title, filters = year, stemmer = "portuguese") tnt_search(idx, "orcamento") #> # A tibble: 0 × 4 #> # ℹ 4 variables: score <dbl>, id <dbl>, title <chr>, year <dbl>

what: Index schema as a tibble — tnt_index_info
title: Index schema as a tibble — tnt_index_info
text: Index schema tibble

title: Index schema as a tibble — tnt_index_info
code: tnt_index_info(idx)

title: Index schema as a tibble — tnt_index_info
text: idx tnt_index.

title: Index schema as a tibble — tnt_index_info
text: tibble one row per field: name, kind, stored, indexed, tokenizer.

title: Index schema as a tibble — tnt_index_info
code: idx <- tnt_index_df(data.frame(t = "hi"), text = t) tnt_index_info(idx) #> # A tibble: 1 × 5 #>   name  kind  stored indexed tokenizer #>   <chr> <chr> <lgl>  <lgl>   <chr>     #> 1 t     text  TRUE   TRUE    default

title: Number of searchable documents — tnt_num_docs
text: Number searchable documents

title: Number of searchable documents — tnt_num_docs
code: tnt_num_docs(idx)

title: Number of searchable documents — tnt_num_docs
text: idx tnt_index.

title: Number of searchable documents — tnt_num_docs
text: single numeric value (committed document count).

title: Number of searchable documents — tnt_num_docs
code: idx <- tnt_index_df(data.frame(t = "hello world"), text = t) tnt_num_docs(idx) #> [1] 1

title: Create a search schema — tnt_schema
text: Combine named tnt_field definitions schema can passed tnt_index().

title: Create a search schema — tnt_schema
code: tnt_schema(...)

title: Create a search schema — tnt_schema
text: ... Named field definitions, e.g. title = tnt_text().

title: Create a search schema — tnt_schema
text: tnt_schema object (named list tnt_fields).

title: Create a search schema — tnt_schema
code: tnt_schema(   id    = tnt_i64(),   title = tnt_text(stemmer = "english"),   body  = tnt_text(stemmer = "english") ) #>  #> ── tantivyr schema (3 fields)  #> • id: i64 #> • title: text [tnt_en] #> • body: text [tnt_en]

title: Search an index — tnt_search
text: Runs BM25 full-text search returns top matches tibble. Supports structured filters, result ordering snippet highlighting.

title: Search an index — tnt_search
code: tnt_search(   idx,   query = "",   limit = 10L,   fields = NULL,   filter = NULL,   highlight = NULL,   snippet_chars = 150L,   order_by = NULL,   desc = TRUE )

title: Search an index — tnt_search
text: idx tnt_index. query query string tantivy's query syntax. empty string "" matches documents (useful filter). limit Maximum number results. Defaults 10. fields <tidy-select> Text fields searched bare (unqualified) query terms. Defaults indexed text fields. filter Either tantivy query string, comparison expression year >= 2020 & source == "globo". Supported operators: ==, %%, >, >=, <, <=, combined & |. highlight <tidy-select> Stored text fields return highlighted snippets . One <field>_snippet column added per selected field, matches wrapped <b> tags. snippet_chars Maximum snippet length characters. Defaults 150. order_by <tidy-select> single numeric/date fast field order instead BM25 score. set, score NA. desc Logical. Order descending (default) order_by set.

title: Search an index — tnt_search
text: tibble score column, every stored field, requested *_snippet columns.

title: Search an index — tnt_search
code: df <- data.frame( id = 1:3, title = c("Quick brown fox", "Lazy dog", "Brown bear"), year = c(2019L, 2021L, 2023L) ) idx <- tnt_index_df(df, text = title, filters = year, stemmer = "english") tnt_search(idx, "brown") #> # A tibble: 2 × 4 #> score id title year #> #> 1 0.499 3 Brown bear 2023 #> 2 0.421 1 Quick brown fox 2019 tnt_search(idx, "brown", filter = year >= 2021) #> # A tibble: 1 × 4 #> score id title year #> #> 1 0.499 3 Brown bear 2023 tnt_search(idx, "fox", highlight = title) #> # A tibble: 1 × 5 #> score id title year title_snippet #> #> 1 0.878 1 Quick brown fox 2019 Quick brown fox

title: List supported stemmer languages — tnt_stemmers
text: List supported stemmer languages

title: List supported stemmer languages — tnt_stemmers
code: tnt_stemmers()

title: List supported stemmer languages — tnt_stemmers
text: character vector language names accepted stemmer argument tnt_text().

title: List supported stemmer languages — tnt_stemmers
code: tnt_stemmers() #>  [1] "none"       "raw"        "portuguese" "english"    "spanish"    #>  [6] "french"     "german"     "italian"    "dutch"      "russian"    #> [11] "swedish"    "norwegian"  "danish"     "finnish"    "romanian"   #> [16] "hungarian"  "turkish"    "arabic"     "greek"      "tamil"

title: Update documents (delete then re-add) — tnt_update
text: Replaces documents deleting existing document shares key value (field) row data, adding rows data. field must exact field (numeric/date, text stemmer = "raw"). Call tnt_commit() afterwards.

title: Update documents (delete then re-add) — tnt_update
code: tnt_update(idx, data, by)

title: Update documents (delete then re-add) — tnt_update
text: idx tnt_index. data data frame replacement documents. <tidy-select> single key column present data schema.

title: Update documents (delete then re-add) — tnt_update
text: tnt_index, invisibly.

title: Update documents (delete then re-add) — tnt_update
code: sch <- tnt_schema(id = tnt_i64(), body = tnt_text(stemmer = "english")) idx <- tnt_index(schema = sch) tnt_add(idx, data.frame(id = 1:2, body = c("old one", "old two"))) |>   tnt_commit() tnt_update(idx, data.frame(id = 1L, body = "new one"), by = id) |>   tnt_commit()

title: tantivyr 0.1.0
text: Initial release. tnt_index_df() indexes data frame one call (auto-schema). Explicit schema API: tnt_schema() tnt_text(), tnt_i64(), tnt_u64(), tnt_f64(), tnt_bool(), tnt_date() tnt_json(). tnt_index() creates opens -disk -memory indexes. tnt_add(), tnt_commit(), tnt_delete() tnt_update() provide incremental updates. tnt_search() returns tibble BM25 scores, structured filters (comparison expressions Tantivy query strings), snippet highlighting fast-field ordering; tnt_count() returns total match counts. Portuguese English stemming stop words, plus Snowball languages.
